extraction.description: This screenshot shows the Debug configuration dialog in UiPath Studio Web for a Conversational Agent inside the Billing Assistant solution. The Solution resources tab is open, listing available Context and Processes on the left and the selected resources to use during debugging on the right. Multiple context sources and process tools are already selected, and the bottom toggles for deploying resources before debugging and showing the dialog before debugging are enabled.
extraction.step_instructions:
1. In the Solution resources tab, review the resources listed under Context and Processes.
2. Select the context sources and process tools to include for debugging; the chosen items appear as blue tags in the Debug using column.
3. Leave Deploy resources before debugging and Show before debugging enabled if you want resources deployed and this dialog shown before each debug run.
4. Click on Save & Debug to start debugging the conversational agent with the selected resources.

layout.rationale: High density (1012 chars) + wide (2.03) or very high text
